---
title: "About me"
toc: false

---
::::: {layout-nrow="1"}
::: figure
![A large tree "cookie" at Calaveras Big Trees State Park](images/tree_cookie.JPG){.regular-hover}
:::
:::figure
![I hyperbolically declared this was the best day of my life](images/tree_pose.JPG){.regular-hover}
:::
:::

Hi! My name is Henderson and I am a third-year undergraduate at UC Santa Barbara studying Environmental Studies and Statistics & Data Science. I'm interested in leveraging data science tools to investigate climate change impacts across environmental systems.

## My food

I'm not competitive about it, but I consider myself to be a pretty big foodie. Let me walk you through it.

## My places

I am originally from Sacramento, CA so all of my adventures branch out from there. My favorite thing to do there is to visit my favorite independent coffee shops and enjoy a drink that is a little too expensive. But it makes for a great meeting place to see old friends.

Moving to Santa Barbara, CA was one of the best decisions I have made. I am making it my mission to catch as many sunset walks as I can before my time expires here.

I've also had the privilege of travelling abroad.

## My plans
